name: BulkDesk
tagline: Helpdesk and support. Ticket management, live chat, knowledge base, SLA tracking. All free, forever.
heroSvg: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 100 100"><defs><linearGradient id="bd-wall" x1="0" y1="0" x2="1" y2="0"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#8899aa"/><stop offset="50%" stop-color="#99aabb"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#7788aa"/></linearGradient><linearGradient id="bd-side" x1="0" y1="0" x2="1" y2="0"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#667788"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#556677"/></linearGradient><linearGradient id="bd-win" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#a8d8ff"/><stop offset="50%" stop-color="#80b8e8"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#4488cc"/></linearGradient></defs><ellipse cx="50" cy="92" rx="35" ry="4" fill="rgba(0,0,0,.15)"/><rect x="18" y="15" width="45" height="75" fill="url(#bd-wall)" stroke="#667" stroke-width=".8"/><polygon points="63,15 82,25 82,90 63,90" fill="url(#bd-side)" stroke="#556" stroke-width=".5"/><rect x="16" y="13" width="49" height="4" fill="#556677" stroke="#445" stroke-width=".5"/><polygon points="63,13 65,17 84,27 82,23" fill="#4a5a6a"/><rect x="24" y="24" width="8" height="10" rx="1" fill="url(#bd-win)" stroke="#5577aa" stroke-width=".5"/><rect x="36" y="24" width="8" height="10" rx="1" fill="url(#bd-win)" stroke="#5577aa" stroke-width=".5"/><rect x="48" y="24" width="8" height="10" rx="1" fill="url(#bd-win)" stroke="#5577aa" stroke-width=".5"/><rect x="24" y="40" width="8" height="10" rx="1" fill="url(#bd-win)" stroke="#5577aa" stroke-width=".5"/><rect x="36" y="40" width="8" height="10" rx="1" fill="url(#bd-win)" stroke="#5577aa" stroke-width=".5"/><rect x="48" y="40" width="8" height="10" rx="1" fill="url(#bd-win)" stroke="#5577aa" stroke-width=".5"/><rect x="34" y="74" width="14" height="16" rx="2" fill="#445566" stroke="#334" stroke-width=".8"/><circle cx="46" cy="82" r="1" fill="#ffd700"/></svg>

features.title: Ticket Management
features.desc: Organize support requests with priority, status, assignee, and tags. Auto-routing rules send tickets to the right team member.

features.title: Live Chat
features.desc: Embeddable chat widget for your website. Real-time conversations, file sharing, typing indicators, and chat transcripts.

features.title: Knowledge Base
features.desc: Self-service help center with categories, search, and article analytics. Reduce ticket volume by helping users help themselves.

features.title: SLA Tracking
features.desc: Set response and resolution time targets. Automatic escalation when SLAs are at risk. Performance reports per agent and team.

features.title: Canned Responses
features.desc: Pre-written reply templates for common questions. Variable substitution for personalization. Share templates across the team.

features.title: CSAT Surveys
features.desc: Automatic satisfaction surveys after ticket resolution. Track CSAT scores per agent, team, and issue type. Identify improvement areas.

useCases.title: E-commerce
useCases.desc: Handle order issues, returns, and shipping questions. Knowledge base reduces repeat tickets. Live chat catches pre-sale questions.

useCases.title: SaaS Companies
useCases.desc: Technical support with SLA tracking. Route bugs to engineering, billing to finance, onboarding to success. Track resolution times.

useCases.title: Service Businesses
useCases.desc: Manage client requests professionally. Shared inbox keeps everyone aligned. CSAT scores show where to improve service quality.
